beds.title: Music Bed — Mellow Latin Fitness Club Draft
beds.note: Revised upbeat background direction: more beat-forward, mellow Latin-club fitness energy with an upscale Newport Beach feel. Original preview, not a direct artist imitation.

beds.title: Foley Bed — Deep Magnetic Recumbent Bike Whir
beds.note: Revised bike layer: deeper smooth electronic resistance whir with the percussive click removed. Built to sit low under dialogue in the final mix.

beds.title: Combined Bed — Music Plus Recumbent Bike Foley
beds.note: Preview mix of the revised mellow Latin-club music and deeper magnetic bike whir, before dialogue ducking or final polish.
